submittedSuccessfullyHeader.completeEmailText: You'll receive a confirmation email to your preferred email address (usually, within 30 minutes). For your privacy, some details won't be in the email.
submittedSuccessfullyHeader.completePostalText: Your confirmation statement and authorization form will be mailed to you within 2 business days. Allow an additional 1 to 3 days for postal delivery.
submittedSuccessfullyHeader.alsoReceiveEmail: Ongoing updates about your pension through your preferred email address
submittedSuccessfullyHeader.alsoReceiveText: A text message confirming your first pension payment
submittedSuccessfullyHeader.alsoReceiveDeliveryNotice: • A notification will be sent to your mailing address if your payment amounts change
submittedSuccessfullyHeader.alsoReceiveEmailNotice: You'll receive a text message confirming your first pension payment.
submittedSuccessfullyHeader.alsoReceiveTextNotice: You'll receive ongoing updates about your pension through your preferred email address.
submittedSuccessfullyHeader.cancelText: If you want to cancel or make changes, contact a specialist at 1-888-555-5555.

submittedSuccessfullyFollowUps.finishText: To finish the pension  retirement process, complete these steps.
submittedSuccessfullyFollowUps.signReturnText: Sign and Return Your Authorization Form Before Oct 3, 2020
submittedSuccessfullyFollowUps.confirmationStatementText: Access the email in your Secure Mailbox in the Message Center on this site. It contains your confirmation statement and important forms that require follow-up.
submittedSuccessfullyFollowUps.reviewConfirmationStatementText: Review the confirmation statement to make sure your pension choices are correct.
submittedSuccessfullyFollowUps.printSignDateText: Print, sign, and date the authorization form.
submittedSuccessfullyFollowUps.whatElseText: What else you need to do
submittedSuccessfullyFollowUps.whereHowText: Where and how to send any documentation
submittedSuccessfullyFollowUps.sendDocumentationText: Send documentation, as specified on the form. It must be received before Oct 3, 2020.

nextStepsSection.nextStepsHMEnroll: You can enroll in Premier Retiree medical coverage up to 90 days before you retire or within 31 days after you retire.
nextStepsSection.nextStepsHMNote: Note: If you don’t enroll within these dates, you will lose eligibility for coverage and won't be able to enroll in the future.

nextStepsSection.nextStepsConsiderOptions: Consider all your options when it comes to accessing your retirement savings.
nextStepsSection.nextStepsHubLink: Still have questions?
nextStepsSection.nextStepsHubText: Check out all the information on the Retirement Hub.

footnoteList.footnoteMessage: Assumes you have completed all the required notifications, paperwork, and authorizations within the required timeframe. It may take up to 30 days to process your payments.
